title: Client Particles Emitter Rate Manual
description: Allows manual control over particle emission through events rather than automatic spawning. Particles are only created when explicitly triggered via Molang or particle events, up to the max_particles limit. Useful for effects that should only spawn under specific conditions, like damage indicators, pickup sparkles, or script-controlled visual feedback.

max_particles.title: Max Particles
max_particles.description: The maximum number of particles that can exist at once. Can be a number or Molang expression.
